sys_atf_suite.name: ITSMMT-215 VA Notification Suite
sys_atf_suite.description: ATF tests for Virtual Agent notification on anomaly escalation.

sys_atf_test.name: ITSMMT-215-T001: VA Message Queued on Degraded
sys_atf_test.description: Assert that a VA message is queued for impacted users when anomaly state reaches Degraded.

sys_atf_test.name: ITSMMT-215-T002: No Notification on Normal State
sys_atf_test.description: Assert that no VA notification is triggered when state is Normal or Anomalous.
